description: A Phoenix LiveView Context Menu component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ContextMenu

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

This component requires the `ContextMenu` JS hook. Copy it from the `Hooks.ContextMenu` block in:
https://github.com/joIibois/elixircn/blob/master/assets/js/app.js

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ContextMenu do use Phoenix.Component attr :id, :string, required: true attr :class, :string, default: nil slot :trigger, required: true slot :inner_block, required: true def context_menu(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@trigger)}
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :disabled, :boolean, default: false attr :rest, :global, include: ~w(phx-click phx-target) slot :inner_block, required: true def context_menu_item(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global def context_menu_separator(assigns) do ~H"""
""" end attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def context_menu_label(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: context-menu
title: Context Menu
